CommunityApplications.Profile: junkerderprovinz Unraid templates — Community Applications templates for apps that run from an upstream Docker image (no custom build): OpenHands, Standard Notes Server (+ LocalStack file storage) and Standard Notes Web UI. Containers with their own image (Krusader, JDownloader, Matrix, featherdrop) live in their own repositories. Maintained by junkerderprovinz; support via the per-app Unraid forum threads or GitHub issues.
